author: Kevin Indig
title: What content works well in LLMs?
content: Kevin Indig presents a study of brand mentions and citations in ChatGPT and other LLMs, analyzing over 7,000 citations across AI platforms. The research reveals that content depth, comprehensiveness, and readability have the biggest impact on LLM visibility. Key insight: content less than three months old is three times more likely to get cited by LLMs, making regular updates critical to AI search strategy. The article emphasizes that topical authority matters for LLM visibility with 4 proof points. Success in AI search requires coordinated efforts across SEO, PR, social, and brand teams to maximize offsite signals. The research demonstrates that GEO and AIO utilize pretty much the same tactics, but in different environments. [Note: Full article is paywalled on Substack. Content extracted from publicly available summaries and search results.]
